name: Concrete Desk Lamp
description: Cast in raw concrete with a brass neck and adjustable shade. Heavy enough to anchor your desk, light enough to redirect anywhere you need it.

related.name: Textile Cable Extension 3m
related.description: Braided cotton textile cable, 3 metres. Matches Raw Concrete and Washed White finishes.

related.name: Inline Dimmer Switch
related.description: Touch-sensitive inline dimmer, compatible with all LUMIO lamps.

related.name: Edison Bulb E27 4W
related.description: Warm 2200K Edison-style filament bulb. Dimmable. Fits all E27 sockets.

en.name: Concrete Desk Lamp
en.description: Cast in raw concrete with a brass neck and adjustable shade. Heavy enough to anchor your desk, light enough to redirect anywhere you need it.

nl.name: Betonnen Bureaulamp
nl.description: Gegoten in ruw beton met een messing hals en verstelbare kap. Zwaar genoeg om je bureau te verankeren, licht genoeg om overal naartoe te richten.

no.name: Betong Skrivebordslampe
no.description: Støpt i rå betong med en messinghals og justerbar skjerm. Tung nok til å forankre skrivebordet ditt, lett nok til å rette overalt du trenger det.
